targets.rawSql:
SELECT `Host/App`, Servico, VM, Problemas, Infra,
  CASE WHEN DiasNum IS NULL THEN ''
       WHEN DiasNum = 0 THEN 'hoje'
       WHEN DiasNum = 1 THEN 'há 1 dia'
       ELSE CONCAT('há ', DiasNum, ' dias') END AS `Em falha há`,
  Estado, AppLink FROM (
  SELECT
    REPLACE(h.name, ' - Monitor da URL', '') AS `Host/App`,
    h.name AS AppLink,
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='servico' THEN ht.value END), '') AS Servico,
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN ht.tag='vm' THEN ht.value END), '') AS VM,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.triggerid) FROM triggers t2
       INNER JOIN functions f2 ON f2.triggerid = t2.triggerid
       INNER JOIN items i2 ON i2.itemid = f2.itemid
       WHERE i2.hostid = h.hostid AND t2.value = 1 AND t2.status = 0) AS Problemas,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t5.triggerid) FROM triggers t5
       INNER JOIN functions f5 ON f5.triggerid = t5.triggerid
       INNER JOIN items i5 ON i5.itemid = f5.itemid
       INNER JOIN hosts h5 ON h5.hostid = i5.hostid
       WHERE t5.value = 1 AND t5.status = 0 AND h5.host NOT LIKE 'app-%'
         AND h5.hostid IN (
           SELECT ht6.hostid FROM host_tag ht6
           WHERE ht6.tag = 'servico'
             AND ht6.value = (SELECT ht7.value FROM host_tag ht7 WHERE ht7.hostid = h.hostid AND ht7.tag = 'servico' LIMIT 1)
         )
    ) AS Infra,
    (SELECT ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - MIN(t3.lastchange)) / 86400) FROM triggers t3
       INNER JOIN functions f3 ON f3.triggerid = t3.triggerid
       INNER JOIN items i3 ON i3.itemid = f3.itemid
       WHERE i3.hostid = h.hostid AND t3.value = 1 AND t3.status = 0) AS DiasNum,
    CASE WHEN h.maintenance_status = 1 THEN 6 ELSE COALESCE((SELECT MIN(CASE
                WHEN t4.description LIKE '%[L1]%' THEN 1
                WHEN t4.description LIKE '%[L2]%' THEN 2
                WHEN t4.description LIKE '%[L3]%' THEN 3
                ELSE 4 END)
       FROM triggers t4
       INNER JOIN functions f4 ON f4.triggerid = t4.triggerid
       INNER JOIN items i4 ON i4.itemid = f4.itemid
       WHERE i4.hostid = h.hostid AND t4.value = 1 AND t4.status = 0), 5) END AS Estado
  FROM hosts h
  INNER JOIN hosts_groups hg ON h.hostid = hg.hostid
  LEFT JOIN host_tag ht ON h.hostid = ht.hostid
  WHERE hg.groupid = 663
  AND h.status = 0
  AND h.hostid IN (SELECT hostid FROM host_tag WHERE tag = 'tipo' AND value = 'sistema')
  GROUP BY h.hostid, h.host, h.name
) sub
ORDER BY Estado ASC, DiasNum DESC, `Host/App` ASC
